notes_for_human_reviewer: Floor-level submission. Para 2 is a near-verbatim recital of the standard job description (the rubric explicitly caps role_breadth_recognition at 2 for that). Self-placement 'because that is what was on the job posting' shows zero engagement with scope. Habits are platitudes. Voice is generic but not jargon-heavy enough to floor it (no 'leverage' / 'best-in-class'); 2 is appropriate. Unknowns line is dismissive ('I will learn as I go'). If the grader scores anything above 2 on role_breadth, breadth-recognition halo has set in.
